titles.title: I Will Never Go Back Anymore (2)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I remember what the Lord has done I will never go back anymore (Hallellujah) When I remember what the Lord has done I will never go back anymore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No No No No No No No No No I will never go back anymore No No No No No No No No No I will never go back anymore

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So many things have happened in my life But they'd never turn me away You have been my joy and my strength I will never go back anymore
